ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the area */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_data" (
  "crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the crime data belongs */,
  "property_crime" REAL /* Property crime rate */,
  "violent_crime" REAL /* Violent crime rate */,
  "total_crime" REAL /* Total crime rate */,
  "murder_rate" REAL /* Murder rate */,
  "rape_rate" REAL /* Rape rate */,
  "robbery_rate" REAL /* Robbery rate */,
  "aggravated_assault_rate" REAL /* Aggravated assault rate */,
  "burglary_rate" REAL /* Burglary rate */,
  "larceny_rate" REAL /* Larceny rate */,
  "motor_vehicle_theft_rate" REAL /* Motor vehicle theft rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the income data belongs */,
  "mean_income" REAL /* Mean household income */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income */,
  "per_capita_income" REAL /* Per capita income */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "income_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of income (e.g., by quintile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the education data belongs */,
  "high_school_dropouts" REAL /* Percentage of high school dropouts */,
  "no_degree" REAL /* Percentage of population with no degree */,
  "any_degree" REAL /* Percentage of population with any degree */,
  "bachelor_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of population with a bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "master_degree_or_higher" REAL /* Percentage of population with a master's degree or higher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "log_crime_data" (
  "log_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log crime data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the log crime data belongs */,
  "log_property_crime" REAL /* Logarithmic property crime rate */,
  "log_violent_crime" REAL /* Logarithmic violent crime rate */,
  "log_total_crime" REAL /* Logarithmic total crime rate */,
  "log_murder_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic murder rate */,
  "log_rape_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic rape rate */,
  "log_robbery_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic robbery rate */,
  "log_aggravated_assault_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic aggravated assault rate */,
  "log_burglary_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic burglary rate */,
  "log_larceny_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic larceny rate */,
  "log_motor_vehicle_theft_rate" REAL /* Logarithmic motor vehicle theft rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_log_crime_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "root_log_crime_data" (
  "root_log_crime_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each root log crime data entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the root log crime data belongs */,
  "root_log_property_crime" REAL /* Root logarithmic property crime rate */,
  "root_log_violent_crime" REAL /* Root logarithmic violent crime rate */,
  "root_log_total_crime" REAL /* Root logarithmic total crime rate */,
  "root_log_murder_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic murder rate */,
  "root_log_rape_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic rape rate */,
  "root_log_robbery_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic robbery rate */,
  "root_log_aggravated_assault_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic aggravated assault rate */,
  "root_log_burglary_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic burglary rate */,
  "root_log_larceny_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic larceny rate */,
  "root_log_motor_vehicle_theft_rate" REAL /* Root logarithmic motor vehicle theft rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("root_log_crime_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_root_log_crime_data_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_standard_deviation" (
  "std_dev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income standard deviation entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the income standard deviation data belongs */,
  "income_std_dev" REAL /* Income standard deviation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("std_dev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_standard_deviation_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "high_bracket_income" (
  "high_bracket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each high bracket income entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area to which the high bracket income data belongs */,
  "high_bracket_income" REAL /* High bracket income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("high_bracket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_high_bracket_income_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution to which the user belongs */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" TEXT /* Specific data that was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., crime rate, income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_data" TEXT /* Data included in the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of dashboard (e.g., crime rate, income) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being collaborated with */,
  "collaboration_name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, project) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message_text" TEXT /* Text of the message */,
  "message_date" TEXT /* Date when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
